verificationNote: AI-generated indicative evidence items for ISO 27001:2022. Organizations should adapt to their ISMS scope and certification body expectations.

evidence.name: Information Security Policy Document
evidence.description: Approved information security policy signed by top management

evidence.name: Security Roles and Responsibilities Matrix
evidence.description: RACI matrix documenting information security roles across the organization

evidence.name: Segregation of Duties Matrix
evidence.description: Matrix identifying conflicting duties and compensating controls

evidence.name: Threat Intelligence Reports
evidence.description: Reports from threat intelligence feeds and analysis of threat relevance

evidence.name: Information Asset Inventory
evidence.description: Complete register of information assets with classification and ownership

evidence.name: Information Classification Scheme
evidence.description: Documented classification levels with handling procedures per level

evidence.name: Access Control Policy
evidence.description: Documented access control policy covering logical and physical access

evidence.name: Authentication Policy and MFA Deployment Report
evidence.description: Policy covering authentication standards and report of MFA coverage

evidence.name: Access Recertification Reports
evidence.description: Evidence of periodic user access reviews and recertification campaigns

evidence.name: Supplier Security Assessment Register
evidence.description: Register of supplier security assessments with risk ratings and review dates

evidence.name: Cloud Security Risk Assessment
evidence.description: Security assessment of cloud service providers including shared responsibility matrix

evidence.name: Incident Response Plan
evidence.description: Documented incident response procedures with roles, classification, and escalation

evidence.name: Post-Incident Review Reports
evidence.description: Documentation of lessons learned and improvement actions from security incidents

evidence.name: BCP/DRP with Security Considerations
evidence.description: Business continuity plan including minimum security posture requirements during disruption

evidence.name: Independent ISMS Audit Reports
evidence.description: Internal and external audit reports covering ISMS effectiveness

evidence.name: Pre-Employment Screening Records
evidence.description: Evidence of background checks completed for new hires and contractors

evidence.name: Security Awareness Training Records
evidence.description: Training completion records and effectiveness assessments for security awareness

evidence.name: Physical Security Assessment Report
evidence.description: Assessment of physical security perimeters and entry controls

evidence.name: CCTV and Monitoring Logs
evidence.description: Physical security monitoring logs and surveillance footage retention records

evidence.name: Media Disposal Certificates
evidence.description: Certificates of secure disposal or destruction for equipment and media

evidence.name: Endpoint Protection Deployment Report
evidence.description: Report showing endpoint protection coverage, versions, and compliance status

evidence.name: Privileged Access Management Report
evidence.description: Report of privileged accounts, PAM tool coverage, and session recordings

evidence.name: Anti-Malware Status Report
evidence.description: Report of anti-malware deployment, signature currency, and detection statistics

evidence.name: Vulnerability Assessment Report
evidence.description: Vulnerability scan results with risk ratings and remediation tracking

evidence.name: Configuration Baseline Compliance Report
evidence.description: Report comparing system configurations against approved security baselines

evidence.name: Backup and Restoration Test Records
evidence.description: Evidence of backup execution and periodic restoration testing

evidence.name: Centralized Log Review Reports
evidence.description: SIEM reports showing log collection coverage and analysis outcomes

evidence.name: Cryptographic Standards Document
evidence.description: Approved cryptographic algorithms, key lengths, and key management procedures

evidence.name: Secure SDLC Documentation
evidence.description: SDLC security procedures, gate criteria, and security testing evidence

evidence.name: Penetration Test Reports
evidence.description: External and internal penetration test reports with findings and remediation

evidence.name: Change Management Records
evidence.description: Change requests, approval records, and post-implementation reviews
